title: Metallic icons
description: Resource pack in metal hearts style
body:
# Resource pack in metal style

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a3c3c3322e2844428d6e846d7e49510f11e5c6f.jpeg)

 ```Currently changing:```
- Hearts (and all their variations)
- Hunger icons (and all their variations)
- Water breathing icons
- Armor icons
- Experience panel
- Horse jumping strip
- Ping icons

```Maybe in the future:```
1. Hotbar
1. Effects
